message:
appstore+smoke: wire rvdna-mcp.ruv.io + ruqu-mcp.ruv.io live URLs

Issue #2 step 7-8: now that both companion MCPs are deployed and
serving 5 tools each behind ruv.io subdomains, surface them.

App Store cards: new 'live:' field on the install map renders as
'● live · rvdna-mcp.ruv.io' (verifier-green) and clickable. Goes
between the MCP companion install line and npm.

scripts/smoke-all.sh: two new entries running the parameterized
smoke-live.sh (URL+EXPECTED_TOOLS env) against each companion
production wire. The full smoke-all is now 6 checks: WASM-local,
rvdna-mcp local HTTP, ruqu-mcp local HTTP, rulake-mcp.ruv.io live,
rvdna-mcp.ruv.io live, ruqu-mcp.ruv.io live (plus optional
cross-mcp browser smoke when --skip-cross is omitted).

files.patch:
@@ -64,6 +64,8 @@ SMOKES=(
   "rvdna-mcp HTTP|${REPO_DIR}/mcp-rvdna/scripts/http-smoke.sh"
   "ruqu-mcp HTTP|${REPO_DIR}/mcp-ruqu/scripts/http-smoke.sh"
   "Production rulake-mcp.ruv.io|${REPO_DIR}/scripts/smoke-live.sh"
+  "Production rvdna-mcp.ruv.io|URL=https://rvdna-mcp.ruv.io/ EXPECTED_TOOLS=5 ${REPO_DIR}/scripts/smoke-live.sh"
+  "Production ruqu-mcp.ruv.io|URL=https://ruqu-mcp.ruv.io/ EXPECTED_TOOLS=5 ${REPO_DIR}/scripts/smoke-live.sh"
 )
 if [[ "${SKIP_CROSS}" -eq 0 ]]; then
   SMOKES+=("Console + mcp-rvdna cross-component|${REPO_DIR}/ui/scripts/smoke-cross-mcp.sh")
